zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Verney於1369年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德時，他的父親William de Verney26歲，母親Elizabeth de Bereham23歲。他於大約1394年與Alice de Langley結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1448年在他的家鄉享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Verney was born in 1369, in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Verney, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth de Bereham, was 23. He married Alice de Langley about 1394. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1448, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Verney est né en 1369, à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Verney, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Bereham, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Langley environ 1394. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1448, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Verney 1369 in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Verney 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Bereham 23. Er hat um 1394 Alice de Langley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1448 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Verney è nato il nel 1369 nel Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Verney, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Bereham, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Langley circa 1394. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1448, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Verneyが1369年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイプトン-ウンデル-ウイチウッドで生まれた時，父William de Verneyは26歳，母Elizabeth de Berehamは23歳であった。約1394年にAlice de Langleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1448年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Verney(이)가 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Verney(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Bereham(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1394년 Alice de Langley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1448년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Verney nasceu em 1369, em Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Verney, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Bereham, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Langley aproximadamente 1394. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1448, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Verney родился в 1369 г. в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Verney было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Bereham, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Langley около 1394 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1448 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Verney nació en 1369, en Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Verney, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Bereham, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Alice de Langley aproximadamente 1394. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1448, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
